$dd:nats.summary: Lambda invoke / result / functions metadata subjects.

subjects.name: LambdasInvoke
subjects.description: Invocation subject for a single lambda. Consumers subscribe to the wildcard using the runner's queue group; producers publish to the specific function token. Default for NATS_LAMBDA_INVOKE_SUBJECT='dd.remote.lambdas.invoke.*'.

params.name: function_name
params.description: Logical function name. Must be a single NATS token (no dots).

subjects.name: LambdasResults
subjects.description: Results fan-out from lambda runs. Default for NATS_LAMBDA_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.lambdas.results

subjects.name: LambdasFunctions
subjects.description: Functions metadata broadcast subject. Default for NATS_LAMBDA_FUNCTIONS_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.lambdas.functions

queueGroups.name: LambdaRunnerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by lambda-runner replicas.
